channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Patricia Mae Santor Wins Seven Golds, Becomes Most Decorated Athlete at 2026 Palarong Pambansa
item.description: At the 2026 Palarong Pambansa held in Agusan del Sur, National Capital Region swimmer Patricia Mae Santor emerged as the most decorated athlete of the event. The UST High School standout achieved a re...

item.title: Former Earth Sciences Secretary M Ravichandran to join IIT Madras as faculty after retirement
item.description: M Ravichandran, who recently retired as the Secretary of the Ministry of Earth Sciences, is set to return to academia by joining the Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT-M) as a faculty member. ...

item.title: U.S. Energy Department Considers Using Surplus Plutonium as Fuel for Civilian Nuclear Reactors
item.description: The U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) is considering a program to make surplus plutonium available for use in nuclear fuel, marking a significant shift from its traditional role in weapons production. U...

item.title: Sonko Calls for Safety Accountability After Deadly Utumishi Girls Dormitory Fire
item.description: Former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko visited students injured in the Utumishi Girls dormitory fire who are currently receiving treatment at Kenyatta National Hospital. The tragic incident led to the dea...

item.title: Panic Erupts as Fire Breaks Out at Cafeteria Inside Magunas Shell Petrol Station in Makuyu
item.description: A fire broke out at the cafeteria inside Magunas Shell Petrol Station in Makuyu, Murang’a County, triggering panic among staff and customers. Detective Jane Mugoh and her team managed to extinguish th...

item.title: Yogi Adityanath launches Hindi edition of emergency medical awareness handbook in Lucknow
item.description: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath has launched the Hindi edition of a public health awareness book titled 'The Red Book of Emergency – Life Saving Tips' in Lucknow. The book is designed to ...

item.title: Rising smoking rates and unregulated vaping among South African youth highlight gaps in tobacco control
item.description: South Africa is facing a worsening public health challenge as both traditional smoking and vaping trends move in the wrong direction. While global tobacco use has declined significantly over the past ...

item.title: Analysis of small modular reactors and the growing gap between nuclear power and renewable energy expansion
item.description: The article discusses arguments from energy analyst Michael Liebreich, who challenges the idea that nuclear power—particularly small modular reactors (SMRs)—can realistically compete with rapidly expa...

item.title: YouTube creators achieve major box office success with two leading horror films
item.description: This article highlights an emerging trend in the film industry where successful YouTube creators are transitioning into mainstream filmmaking with significant commercial impact. Over a recent weekend,...

item.title: Japan rejects ‘new militarism’ claims and warns of China’s rapid military expansion at Singapore summit
item.description: At the Shangri-La Dialogue security summit in Singapore, Japan’s Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi firmly rejected accusations that Tokyo is embracing “new militarism,” while at the same time raising ...

item.title: Paris Saint-Germain Wins 2026 Champions League After Defeating Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) secured a historic victory by defeating Arsenal to claim the 2026 UEFA Champions League title. The match, a high-stakes showdown between two of Europe's elite football clubs,...

item.title: British Aluminium Industry Struggles with High Energy Costs Under Net Zero Policies
item.description: Tom Uppington, managing director of Alvance British Aluminium in Fort William, Scotland, has criticised the UK Government's Net Zero policies, claiming they are effectively a form of 'nimbyism' that u...

item.title: Rockstar North Employees in the UK Form Union Amid Labor Dispute and Return-to-Office Tensions
item.description: Workers across Rockstar Games’ UK studios have formally announced the creation of a union, marking a significant development in ongoing labor tensions within the company. The newly formed Rockstar Gam...

item.title: Police search for suspect after alleged targeted stabbings and car crash across Epping and Dandenong North
item.description: Victoria Police are searching for a man following a series of violent incidents across two Melbourne suburbs on Sunday morning, involving two alleged stabbings and a deliberate car crash into a reside...

item.title: Canberra Residents Rally to Protect Big Splash Water Park
item.description: On a chilly autumn Saturday, more than 300 Canberrans gathered at the Big Splash water park in Macquarie to show their support and defend its future. Organised by the Save Big Splash group, the event ...

item.title: Rivers Monarch links state development to peace, unity under Governor Fubara
item.description: The Eze Oha Evo III of Evo Kingdom, His Majesty King Leslie N. Eke, has said that the steady development being witnessed in Rivers State is largely as a result of peace, unity, and the calm leadership...

item.title: George Ruto reacts after attending Champions League final where PSG beat Arsenal in Budapest
item.description: George Ruto, the youngest son of President William Ruto, was among the spectators who attended the UEFA Champions League final held in Budapest, where Arsenal faced Paris Saint-Germain (PSG). The high...

item.title: Sermon Emphasizes Repentance as an Act of Humility Before God
item.description: A recent sermon has delivered a strong message clarifying the meaning of repentance, stating that confessing sins and seeking forgiveness should not be seen as weakness, but instead as a deep act of h...

item.title: Nigerian Governors Discuss Possible Increase of Minimum Wage to N100,000 Amid Economic Pressure
item.description: Nigerian state governors have opened discussions around the possibility of increasing the national minimum wage to as high as N100,000, in response to the growing economic hardship facing workers acro...

item.title: Longford residents face uncertainty over Heathrow expansion and rising aircraft noise
item.description: Residents of Longford, a historic village located directly beside Heathrow Airport, are facing growing uncertainty due to long-discussed plans for a potential third runway and changes to flight operat...
